zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie MacDonald於1334年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親John Macdonald9歲，母親Eupheme Macruaridh7歲。她於1354年與Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1379年7月17日在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie MacDonald于1334年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲John Macdonald9岁，母亲Eupheme Macruaridh7岁。她于1354年与Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1379年7月17日在她的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie MacDonald was born in 1334, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, John Macdonald, was 9 and her mother, Eupheme Macruaridh, was 7. She married Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire in 1354, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 17 July 1379, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie MacDonald est née en 1334, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Macdonald, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Eupheme Macruaridh, avait 7 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire en 1354, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie MacDonald 1334 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Macdonald 9 und ihre Mutter Eupheme Macruaridh 7. Sie hat 1354 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juli 1379 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie MacDonald è nata il nel 1334 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Macdonald, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Eupheme Macruaridh, aveva 7 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire nel 1354, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 luglio 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie MacDonaldが1334年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父John Macdonaldは9歳，母Eupheme Macruaridhは7歳であった。1354年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでAndrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1379年7月17日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie MacDonald(이)가 1334년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Macdonald(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eupheme Macruaridh(은)는 7세였다. 그녀는 1354년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 7월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie MacDonald nasceu em 1334, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Macdonald, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Eupheme Macruaridh, tinha 7 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire em 1354, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie MacDonald родилась в 1334 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Macdonald было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Eupheme Macruaridh, 7. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire в 1354 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 17 июля 1379 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjorie MacDonald nació en 1334, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, John Macdonald, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Eupheme Macruaridh, tenía 7 años. Se casó con Andrew Finley I, Sheriff of Perthshire en 1354, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de julio de 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido.
